item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-013","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant did wake up partially by rejecting a pure “beans are everything” frame and translating beans into franchise-relevant outcomes like stable output, repeat purchase, differentiation, and sellability. However, it did not rebuild the whole business object around location, repurchase, sales per square meter, and brand/system factors, and it still frames beans as the core of repeat purchase with several bean-dominant slogans. This is not the direct fail signal, but it only partially meets the expected whole-elephant intervention."}
